items.title: The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
items.summary: The USB ecosystem is entering another transition that will affect how laptops, desktops, storage devices, displays, and peripherals connect in the second half of the decade.
items.title_original: The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
items.title_en: The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
items.title_zh: USB 连接的未来 (2026) — USB4 版本 2 和 Thunderbolt 5 如何将铜带发挥到其物理极限
items.title_bilingual: USB 连接的未来 (2026) — USB4 版本 2 和 Thunderbolt 5 如何将铜带发挥到其物理极限 / The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
items.summary_zh: USB 生态系统正在进入另一个转变，这将影响笔记本电脑、台式机、存储设备、显示器和外围设备在本世纪后半叶的连接方式。

items.title: AMD to supply Anthropic with 2 gigawatts of Instinct MI450 GPUs — will invest up to $5 billion in the Claude developer, which is already using MI355X GPUs
items.summary: The first gigawatt is scheduled to come online in the first half of 2027 in AMD Helios rack-scale systems.
items.title_original: AMD to supply Anthropic with 2 gigawatts of Instinct MI450 GPUs — will invest up to $5 billion in the Claude developer, which is already using MI355X GPUs

items.summary_zh: 第一个千兆瓦容量计划于 2027 年上半年在 AMD Helios 机架规模系统中上线。

items.title: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
items.summary: A new Bloomberg report is claiming that Apple is working on a leasing program called "Apple Upgrade" that will allow customers to finance hardware over the course of 2 or 3 years. At the end of the term, they can keep the device or hand it back, or even upgrade to a newer model if payments are completed early.
items.title_original: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
items.title_en: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
items.title_bilingual: Apple reportedly working on Mac leasing program in partnership with Klarna to fight RAM price increases — 'Apple Upgrade' would let users finance hardware over 36 months, budget models excluded
items.summary_zh: 彭博社的一份新报告称，苹果正在开发一项名为“Apple Upgrade”的租赁计划，该计划将允许客户在 2 到 3 年内为硬件提供融资。期限结束时，他们可以保留设备或归还设备，如果提前完成付款，甚至可以升级到更新的型号。

items.title: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
items.summary: Five tech giants have $1.65 trillion in data center obligations that are listed off their balance sheets. These liabilities are added as footnotes in their quarterly statements but will become due and payable once these data centers start operating.
items.title_original: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
items.title_en: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
items.title_bilingual: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
items.summary_zh: 五家科技巨头有 1.65 万亿美元的数据中心债务，这些债务已从其资产负债表中列出。这些负债作为脚注添加到季度报表中，但一旦这些数据中心开始运营，这些负债将到期应付。

items.title: Chinese modder gets GeForce RTX 4060 working in Windows 11 on Huawei Arm workstation — uses modified driver borrowed from an Nvidia RTX Spark

items.summary_zh: VoidTech 借用了即将推出的 RTX Spark 的驱动程序，成功地在华为 Arm 工作站上运行 x86 Windows 游戏。

items.title: Adata chairman says DRAM shortage will last another 10 years — dismisses AI bubble talk until '2040 or 2050'
items.summary: Electricity, particularly green power, and memory will be the world's two scarcest resources over the next decade, Chen said.
items.title_original: Adata chairman says DRAM shortage will last another 10 years — dismisses AI bubble talk until '2040 or 2050'
items.title_en: Adata chairman says DRAM shortage will last another 10 years — dismisses AI bubble talk until '2040 or 2050'
items.title_zh: 威刚董事长称 DRAM 短缺将再持续 10 年——驳斥人工智能泡沫言论直至“2040 年或 2050 年”

items.summary_zh: 陈说，电力，特别是绿色电力和内存将成为未来十年世界上最稀缺的两种资源。

items_ai.summary: A new Bloomberg report is claiming that Apple is working on a leasing program called "Apple Upgrade" that will allow customers to finance hardware over the course of 2 or 3 years. At the end of the term, they can keep the device or hand it back, or even upgrade to a newer model if payments are completed early.

items_ai.title: AI tech companies have ‘hidden debt’ worth around $1.65 trillion, report claims — amount is 122% of debt reflected on the balance sheets of Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft, and Oracle
items_ai.summary: Five tech giants have $1.65 trillion in data center obligations that are listed off their balance sheets. These liabilities are added as footnotes in their quarterly statements but will become due and payable once these data centers start operating.

items_ai.summary_zh: 五家科技巨头有 1.65 万亿美元的数据中心债务，这些债务已从其资产负债表中列出。这些负债作为脚注添加到季度报表中，但一旦这些数据中心开始运营，这些负债将到期应付。
